characters.name: Albert
characters.description: Albert JohnsonisMr. Mittens' butler. Albert doesn't seem to have resentment against Johnny, but he was forced into joining theJohnny Stopping Evil Force 5because he has to take care of Mr. Mittens all the time. He actually hates his job and considered quitting. He's admitted that he's only doing his job because of the benefits.

characters.name: Aliens (Johnny O's)
characters.description: The Aliens are one-time villains that only appear inJohnny-O'swho invaded Porkbelly, using their blasters, but Johnny throws cereal into their mouths until they ran off.

characters.name: Alley Cats
characters.description: TheAlley Catsare characters that first appear inHere Johnny, Here Boy, where they see Johnny in the form of a dog attacking him, butDukeycomes to the rescue and fights back. They were later seen inThe Dog Days of Johnny, as one of them tries to attack Johnny again (this time in his human form), but luckily Dukey scares him away. Then Johnny takes a walk through porkbelly kicking a can, when out of nowhere, the alley cat reappears and a whole clowder of them chases him.Alley CatsGeneral InformationFriendseach otherEnemiesJohnnyDukeyDetailsFirst ApperenceHere Johnny, Here Boy Dukey

characters.name: Astrovia
characters.description: Astroviais an actress who appears inJohnny McCoolas the female lead inSpeed McCool's movie. Astrovia speaks with a russian accent and played the part of a double agent/romantic interest. Someone who looks very similar to Astrovia appeared at the beginning ofThe Quantum of Johnnyas the "hot lady" who picks up Speed at the end of the movie.

characters.name: Baby Bot
characters.description:
Hugh Test (Formerly)
Lila Test (Formerly) DukeySusan TestMary TestDark VeganMr. MittensBrain Freezer SusanandMary Test(creators/sisters; formerly)Lila Test(mother; formerly)Hugh Test(father; formerly)Hugh-Bot (adoptive father)Lila-Bot (adoptive mother) Although looking like an adorable baby, Baby Bot is actually a manipulator two-face robot.SusanandMarycreated him because they wanted a cute baby brother who would be more obedient thanJohnny, only for him to reveal his true colors. His idea for revenge is to be the only child, going as far to eliminate Johnny, Susan and Mary, and evenDukey, making him one of Johnny Test's most dangerous villains.

characters.name: Blackbeard
characters.description: ProfileGenderMaleHair ColorBlackEye ColorBlackCaptain Blackbeardor simplyBlackbeard(real name: Edward Teach) is a pirate captain that debuts in the episode "Hoist the Johnny Roger". His appearance is that of an stereotypical pirate captain.

characters.name: Blast Ketchup
characters.description: Jerk Blast Ketchup(voiced byKathleen Barr) is a minor recurring antagonist inJohnny Testseries who first appeared inJohnny'monand appears again inReturn of Johnny'mon. Blast has brown hair, a yellow headband with a red diamond shape on it, a black shirt with dark blue cuffs and collar, a red vest/sleeveless jacket, pants, large navy blue wristbands, and tennis shoes. Blast is a snobbish and self-centered hero of theTiny'monseries, who sees everyone as his fight opponent, attacking them and believing that no one could be better at fighting or collecting Tiny'mon than him. He's often frustrated whenJohnny Testdefeats him withScreechereen. At the end ofReturn of Johnny'mon, Blast seemed to have fewer issues with Johnny (where he admits that Johnny's a great player), but he still wishes to beat him in a battle someday.

characters.name: Bling-Bling Boy
characters.description: Gil Nexdor Eugene "Bling-Bling Boy" Hamiltonis a recurring anti hero in the series who has a one-sided crush on Susan. Bling-Bling is a gluttonous, out of shape pale boy with brown hair and blue eyes (though he once claimed they were hazel) and freckles on his cheeks. He wears an all white outfit consisting of a collared shirt, pants with yellow stripes on the sides and sneakers also with yellow stripes. He wears a gold necklace and knuckles with 3 "B"'s, hence his nickname. characters.name: Bling-Bling Boy's Technicians
characters.description: Bling-Bling Boy's TechniciansGeneral InformationGenderMalesFriendsBling-Bling Boy Bling-Bling Boy's Techniciansare a group of scientists that work and invent creations for Eugene "Bling-Bling Boy" Hamilton. They were first introduced inJohnny vs. Bling-Bling Boy. They usually help Bling Bling boy to move his evil plans forward or (much to their despite) to build an invention to trap, catch or stealSusan Testor make her fall in love with him. they often warn Bling-Bling about the flaws or the events that might happen to him after using the invention, which he never pays attention to them. they also like being challenged by the Test twins on inventing something better to fight with. (Johnny vs. Bling-Bling: The Ultimate Battle)

characters.name: Boat Racers
characters.description: The Boat Racers are a team of boat racers that forcedJohnnyand his friends to race them, after he made fun of them, in the episodeJohnny Boat Racing. They followed Johnny and Dukey back to the lab and hear about them challenging the Kirk Kirkland and his team, using speed boats. characters.name: Boyborgs
characters.description: Boyborgsare the robotic duplicates designed to look likeGil Nexdor, built bySusanandMary Test. They are the main antagonists ofJohnny vs. Super Soaking Cyborgs, after they learn that the Twins love Gil more than them and so they attempt to eliminate him. The Boyborgs appear to look like Gil; blonde parted hair, blue eyes, a striped shirt and white undershirt with cargo shorts with Bill having an orange shirt, Will having blue and Phil having green. However, they appear to have an overbite and a robotic facial appearance. They also have bolts along their arms as well as bolts that hold their lower jaw to their head. Philis the android who is dressed in a green shirt, helmet, and brown pants.

characters.name: Boyborgs

However, they appear to have an overbite and a robotic facial appearance. They also have bolts along their arms as well as bolts that hold their lower jaw to their head. Philis the android who is dressed in a green shirt, helmet, and brown pants.

characters.name: Brack-Breaker
characters.description: Brack-Breakeris a minor character who appeared in "Stinkin' Johnny". He is one of the wrestlers who wanted to fight theCave Man. When he was ready to fight the Caveman, he gets spinned in circles and the Cave Man throws him out of the cage, defeated.

characters.name: Brack-Breaker
characters.description: Brack-Breakeris a minor character who appeared in "Stinkin' Johnny". He is one of the wrestlers who wanted to fight theCave Man. When he was ready to fight the Caveman, he gets spinned in circles and the Cave Man throws him out of the cage, defeated.

characters.name: Brain Freezer
characters.description: Adolescent (possibly) Ice Blue (as Brain Freezer) Sargent Save More (superhero identityThe Last Flight of Johnny X)Frosty villain (byMr. White)BF (byJohnny Test)Lowly coffee guy (byProfessor Slopsink)Crazy coffee guy (byDukey)Global Hunter of Cool (self given,Johnny X Strikes Back)Freezing Genius (self given) Brain Freezer can act like a "sore loser" when it comes to losing, but he is shown to be smart with his ice gadgets, but he uses his intelligence for science in an evil way. He usually behaves almost like any other villain towardsJohnny, but despite this, their relationship slightly changed after the events ofJohnnycicle, acting more like a frenemy towards Johnny. Compared to his civil personality, who's usually more shy and anxious, his villain persona is more loud and evil. Despite his evil personality, he's lonely and the girls are constantly rejecting him, which he responds with madness. His reason to become evil due to rejection from the blonde girl he was interested in. This leads to his character to be sympathetic. InThe Revenge of Johnny's Baby Bro, he as well as Dark Vegan and Mr. Mittens feel sorry for Johnny when Baby Bot renders him helpless. InJohnnycicle, he feels guilty for scaring away the blonde girl. He's shown some signs of jealously which is mostly noticeable inJohnny vs. Brain Freezer, when he watched Susan and Mary getting an A+ for their self generating surfboard, while he was belittled byProfessor Slopsinkas just a "coffee guy". After the villains defeat and imprisonment inJohnny X: A New Beginninghe is seen venting to the other villains about his insecurities saying he wishes to be born a girl instead of being evil.

characters.name: Bruce Bandit
characters.description: Bruce BanditBruce BanditGeneral InformationPowers And AbilitiesNoneGenderMaleAgeUnknownHair ColorBrownEye ColorBlackStatusDeceasedAliasesBrucePersonaltyEasily confusedFriendsHis gangEnemiesThe sheriffRelationshipsAlignmentBadLikesRobbing trainsDislikesTrains being stolen before himFamilyUnknownPetsHis horseDetailsVoiced ByColin MurdockFirst ApperenceOld School Johnny Bruce Bandit was a bandit known for robbing “the 415 Train” on March 3rd 1845 on the same day asThe Great Porkbelly FireuntilJohnnywent back in time preventing him from doing so. After that he was forgotten about and was no longer a prominent historical figure inPorkbelly. Mr. Teachermandressed up as Bruce in order to show his historical significance to Johnny

characters.name: Bumper Randalls
characters.description: Brain Freezer,Mr. Mittens,Zizrar,The Beekeeper,Dark Vegan,Dukey(gets in the way) (formerly),Susan Test(formally),Mary Test(formally) Mrs. Randalls (mother) Mitchell "Bumper" Randalls(voiced byScott McNeil): A local bully who regularly tortures the kids atJohnny's school, though Johnny is his favorite victim. He first appeared inJohnny Impossible. He was born on August 8, 1993. Bumper acts like a stereotypical school bully, treating his habits with great enthusiasm. However, he also has a sensitive side, at one point revealing that he loves roses and he even has a rose garden. His father seems to want him to be a wrestler, but he just wants to grow flowers so he takes his anger out on Johnny. Despite his hostility towards Johnny, Bumper is willing to ally with him should the need arise, and never lets a favor go unreturned, leading to his temporary recruitment into the Johnny Saving Force 5. he later became friends with Johnny starting inJohnny's New BFF. Bumper has many pets: a white dog named "Cuddles", an unnamed orange tomcat, a lizard named Mr. Muncher and an unnamed bulldog.

characters.name: Bumper Randalls
characters.description: Brain Freezer,Mr. Mittens,Zizrar,The Beekeeper,Dark Vegan,Dukey(gets in the way) (formerly),Susan Test(formally),Mary Test(formally) Mrs. Randalls (mother) Mitchell "Bumper" Randalls(voiced byScott McNeil): A local bully who regularly tortures the kids atJohnny's school, though Johnny is his favorite victim. He first appeared inJohnny Impossible. He was born on August 8, 1993. Bumper acts like a stereotypical school bully, treating his habits with great enthusiasm. However, he also has a sensitive side, at one point revealing that he loves roses and he even has a rose garden. His father seems to want him to be a wrestler, but he just wants to grow flowers so he takes his anger out on Johnny. Despite his hostility towards Johnny, Bumper is willing to ally with him should the need arise, and never lets a favor go unreturned, leading to his temporary recruitment into the Johnny Saving Force 5. he later became friends with Johnny starting inJohnny's New BFF. Bumper has many pets: a white dog named "Cuddles", an unnamed orange tomcat, a lizard named Mr. Muncher and an unnamed bulldog.

characters.name: Bus Driver
characters.description: TheBus Driveris a minor character that only debuted inRunaway Johnny, when Johnny and Dukey tried to ask him to take them far away from Porkbelly but he ended up dropping them off at the same stop they were waiting at.Bus DriverGeneral InformationGenderMaleHair ColorOrangeDetailsFirst ApperenceRunaway Johnny
